text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a week left until Mejiro Bright's race in the tryouts. I've got to
figure out how to realize her potential before then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: First things first, let me introduce you to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
From the left, we have the elegant Dober, followed by the proud
McQueen. And last but not least, the kind Ryan, whom I love very
dearly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, welcome to our tea party. Oh, and Bright? Who's this again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is Provisional Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Provisional?
choice_data_list:
I promised her I'd help her train until the
tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. The tryouts are indeed approaching, and having a
professional give you feedback is very important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So? Spill the beans—how's Bright holding up? You two might've just
started training, but still, I gotta know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hah, whew... Aaand now! O-oh my. It seems I've crossed the finish
line again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I'd suspected, her starts could use some work—probably due
to her mellow manner. On top of that, she tends to forget to
accelerate in the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Do you mind if I keep running for a bit? I'm still brimming with energy,
so let us move on to the next training item.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, her running form itself isn't bad at all. From an objective
standpoint, she definitely has the ideal legs for racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I can coach some strategy and timing into her, then she should be
able to make up for her weaknesses. Now she just needs—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Provisional Trainer, would you like some tea? It goes very well with a
dash of apple compote. Give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pleasant, isn't it? A cup of tea can make you feel all warm and fuzzy.
Perfect for a cold winter's day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, Dober taught me this. She has it all together,
and she's taught me countless things. Isn't she just lovely?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And when I'm out basking in the sun, McQueen often comes to drape
a blanket over me. I'm blessed by her kindness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And I haven't even begun to speak of her beautiful running! She's elegant and gorgeous—my ideal. Every time she runs, I'm mesmerized.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right?! It doesn't get better than McQueen's running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. I love your running too, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Each of your steps is filled with power, as if you're bounding off the
earth with each stride. It reflects your strength of will, and I admire
that very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, now you're just laying it on thick!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It's all true, you know? I sincerely respect and admire all of you here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, we're surrounded by brilliant talents. I'm sure that if Bright
hosted the upcoming event, it would turn out to be a great success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A meet and greet is being held soon where Mejiro racers who've
made their debuts interact with their fans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober and I have yet to debut, so we shall only be watching. Ah, but
if you would like, please do join us, Provisional Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the tea party, everyone returns to the academy. I'm currently
waiting for my provisional trainee, Mejiro Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Bright's train—I mean Provisional Trainer! Just wanted to say thanks
for today. It was fun having you around!
choice_data_list: Sorry for barging in on your tea party.
Sorry for barging in on your tea party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't sweat it. Didn't Bright drag you there anyways? I'm sure
she had her own reasons.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know how she's always so chill and laid-back? Actually, she's a
real tough cookie.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, yup! I'm not the kind of gal someone should be lookin' up to.
But when Bright tells me how much I mean to her, even I... can believe
in myself a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So if Bright's picked you out as her trainer, then I bet she's got a
good reason. Make sure you take good care of her, all right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan brings up a good point. Why did Mejiro Bright trust me with
overseeing her training? I guess I should ask her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I had to say, it's because you watched that leaf together with
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As you can probably tell, I'm a bit of an airhead. Compared to
my peers, it takes me longer to gather my thoughts, and even longer
to improve myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've always been like this, even when I was a child. I've failed to live
up to the expectations of so many people.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, there is no greater shame.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, I still believe in my own abilities. Though I may walk
in the shadow of my peers, I am still a Mejiro through and through.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to enter the tryouts so I could finally show the world my true
potential. Yet as I was, I could not hope to accomplish that goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That is when I met you. When I was spacing out towards the sky, you
adapted yourself to my pace and accompanied me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You understood me for who I was, and who I could yet become. Just
as Ryan once showed me glimmers of hope, you ignited a new spark
within me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I've decided—I will become the light of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The light of the Mejiro family... Behind her gentle tone lies a fiery,
smoldering determination—her reason for running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That resolve is the final piece of the puzzle. After all, the first step to
any journey starts with a wish. Now we just have to put in the work.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Once I hear the signal, I'll pick up the pace... I just need to be ready—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant... Right! Here... I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to teach her when to accelerate. It takes time to speed up,
so I give her the signal a bit early.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hah, hah... Provisional Trainer, did I accelerate at the right time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad. Having a signal to watch out for is very helpful. I can run
more freely when I have something like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no guarantee Bright will be able to replicate this success
during the tryouts. Still, she has her own reasons for winning, and
that'll surely push her past the finish line.
